publicNotes: Main Village website. Site structure supports HTML change detection. Recommended as the primary reference for any Village-wide notices or announcements.
Community history page. Specific URL to be confirmed. Supports timeline event citations. Low change frequency expected — not a high-priority monitoring target.
Boards and Commissions page — primary source for civic roster data. HTML structure supports automated change detection. Changes here trigger a roster review workflow.
Staff Directory page. HTML structure supports automated change detection. Only official titles and contact emails are captured — no personal contact details.
Legal Notices and Postings page — primary source for public documents. Document link detection can surface new postings. All detected documents enter a review queue before publication.
Elections page. HTML change detection planned for election cycle monitoring. Election-night results are unofficial until certified — any results updates are held pending certification.
Outagamie County election results. Document link detection planned. Unofficial results are clearly labeled. Certified results are published after canvass board completion.
State-level election reference. Not a structured data endpoint — used for linking residents to official results. No automation planned at this time.
Address-lookup tool for elected officials. This site links residents to MyVote directly rather than replicating its data. No automation planned.
ArcGIS Hub for Village parcel data, zoning, and land use maps. API access may be available via ArcGIS REST endpoints. Medium readiness pending API key and endpoint confirmation.
County GIS for parcel and property data. Potential integration with County's open data endpoints. URL and access method to be confirmed.
State population estimates published annually. Data is in Excel or PDF format — manual extraction required. Annual update cycle means monitoring frequency is low.
Town, Village and City tax data published annually. Manual data extraction required. Annual update cycle.
Planning document — static once adopted. Direct URL to be confirmed. No automated monitoring needed; monitor for amendments via legal notices.
Available via ArcGIS Hub. Map layer changes can be monitored via ArcGIS REST API. Medium readiness.
Planning document — static once adopted. Direct URL to be confirmed.
Planning document — static once adopted. Direct URL to be confirmed.
Infrastructure planning document. Static once adopted. Direct URL to be confirmed.
Infrastructure planning document. Static once adopted. Direct URL to be confirmed.
Referenced in Resolution No. 6-26 (2026). Document posted on Legal Notices page.
